description_long: This doll features a robust, rounded head with intricate, Aztec-inspired carvings on the face, including symmetrical geometric patterns and stylized facial features. The body is squat and sturdy, with short arms and legs, and is adorned with engraved motifs that echo the ancient stone sculpture aesthetic. The surface has a weathered, stone-like texture, giving the impression of an artifact or idol. The doll stands on a hexagonal base that appears to be made of the same material, with visible chipping and wear along the edges. The arms are slightly bent and the hands are shaped into simple, rounded forms. The overall coloration is a dark, muted brown with subtle variations, enhancing the impression of aged stone.
description: A squat, stone-textured doll with Aztec-style carvings, rounded limbs, and a hexagonal base, all in dark, weathered brown.
description_view_0: Front view shows the detailed carved face and chest patterns, with both arms visible and the hexagonal base prominent.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the rounded head, arm engravings, and the thickness of the body, with minimal facial detail visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, unadorned back of the head and body, with both arms and legs visible but no facial features.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the rounded head, arm engravings, and the side profile of the hexagonal base.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll is not wearing any clothing but features engraved patterns and motifs reminiscent of ancient Aztec or Mesoamerican ceremonial attire, with stylized geometric designs on the torso and limbs.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with both arms slightly bent and angled downward, legs apart, and the head facing forward. The posture is static and symmetrical.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with stylized, symmetrical carvings representing eyes, nose, and mouth, lacking any dynamic emotional cues.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is smooth and rounded, consistent with a carved stone idol.
